metadata.title: Power of Attorney [The Viking Press] | Vollmacht, SZ-AP2/L-S7.4

context:
## Dieses Dokument

- Titel: Power of Attorney [The Viking Press]
- Signatur: SZ-AP2/L-S7.4
- Datum: 1935, January 29
- Sprache: Englisch
- Objekttyp: Vollmacht
- Umfang: 1 Blatt
- Anmerkungen: Vollmacht für „The Viking Press, New York, NY“

pages.transcription:
113—Power of Attorney. R CF ED.CO JULIUS BLUMBERG, INC., LAW BLANK PUBLISHERS
71 BROADWAY AND 1 RECTOR ST., NEW YORK

Know all Men by these Presents,
THAT I, Stefan Zweig of 11 Portland Place, London, England

have made, constituted and appointed, and by these presents do make, constitute and appoint
THE VIKING PRESS INC.

my true and lawful attorney for me and in my name, place and stead
to transact all and any nature of business in which I may be engaged or
interested now or hereafter, to make, file and pay on Federal State or
Municipal Taxes, open bank accounts, make deposits therein and make with-
drawals therefrom, all or any of the foregoing acts to be transacted in its
name or in my name as it may elect.

unto my said attorney full power and authority to do and perform all and every act and
thing whatsoever requisite and necessary to be done in and about the premises, as fully, to all
intents and purposes, as I might or could do if personally present, with full power of
substitution and revocation, hereby ratifying and confirming all that my said attorney or
its substitute shall lawfully do or cause to be done by virtue hereof.
pages.notes: Die handschriftlichen Ergänzungen sind in die maschinengeschriebenen Zeilen integriert. Ein Stempelabdruck ist im rechten Bereich des Textes schwach erkennbar.

pages.transcription:
In Witness Whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and seal the
twenty-ninth day of January in the year one thousand
nine hundred and thirty five
Sealed and delivered in the presence of
Stefan Zweig
Witness
B. W. Huebsch

State of New York
County of New York
ss.:

Be it Known, That on the twenty-ninth day
of January one thousand nine hundred and thirty five
before me came CHARLES MARGOLIN
a Notary Public in and for the State of New York
duly commissioned and sworn, dwelling in White Plains, N.Y.
personally came and appeared STEFAN ZWEIG

to me personally known, and known to me to be the same person de-
scribed in and who executed the within Power of Attorney, and he
acknowledged the within Power of Attorney to be his act and deed.
In Testimony Whereof, I have hereunto subscribed my
name and affixed my seal of office, the day and year last above written.
pages.notes: Handschriftliche Unterschriften von Stefan Zweig, B. W. Huebsch und Charles Margolin. Stempel des Notars am unteren Rand.

result.confidence_notes: Der Text ist durch die Kombination von Maschinenschrift und klaren handschriftlichen Ergänzungen sehr gut lesbar.
